jd_text:
CTO – Dubai – UAE-N/Arabic Speaker
Key ResponsibilitiesDefine and drive the company’s technology strategy, ensuring alignment with overall business objectives while identifying opportunities for innovation and operational efficiency.Lead the engineering function with a hands-on approach, including conducting architecture and code reviews, establishing technical standards, and making key build vs. buy decisions.Own and evolve the end-to-end technical architecture of the company’s products and platforms, including system design, technology stack selection, data architecture, and engineering best practices.Design, implement, and oversee robust security architecture across all products, including threat modeling, secure SDLC practices, penetration testing, and incident response planning.Stay abreast of emerging technologies and industry trends, leading research and development initiatives to evaluate and adopt new solutions that support business growth.Evaluate, select, and manage technology vendors and partners, including contract negotiation and performance management to ensure optimal value delivery.Oversee the technology budget, ensuring effective allocation of resources across strategic and operational initiatives while identifying cost optimization opportunities.Collaborate closely with executive leadership and cross-functional teams to align technology initiatives with business priorities, ensuring clear communication and stakeholder engagement.Ensure compliance with relevant laws, regulations, and industry standards related to technology, data privacy, and information security, implementing policies to mitigate risk and maintain governance.
RequirementsDemonstrated hands-on experience in modern software development within the past 3–5 years.Strong ability to conduct code reviews and assess software architecture, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.Proven experience working with cloud-native architectures (AWS, Azure, or GCP), along with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.Experience designing and developing APIs, microservices, and distributed systems in complex environments.Solid understanding of modern security engineering practices, extending beyond governance into implementation.Hands-on proficiency in at least one modern programming language, such as Python, Go, Java, or TypeScript.Candidates must have recent, practical experience in software development or system architecture within the last 5 years. Profiles lacking this will not be considered.
QualificationsBachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field; a Master’s degree is preferred.20+ years of experience in senior technology leadership roles, with substantial hands-on expertise in software development and system architecture.Proven track record of driving technology innovation, including the design, development, and successful implementation of scalable solutions.Strong leadership and communication skills, with the ability to inspire, mentor, and manage high-performing engineering teams.Demonstrated experience in shaping innovation strategy, as well as managing technology budgets, resource planning, and vendor relationships.
